name: Messenger
description: A basic wooden bow. It is said to have once been used as a tool for long-distance communication.

description.r1: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional __100%__ ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r2: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional __125%__ ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r3: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional __150%__ ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r4: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional __175%__ ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r5: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional __200%__ ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
